title: elaphoglossum rupicola
intro: Elaphoglossum rupicola, also known as the rock Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum rupicola are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
